## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the NGINX content approval process and weekly production.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**NGINX Approval Process:** Joel will manually merge approved copy into the bank's G-Drive doc. Carly will add new status fields to Airtable for tracking the multi-stage approval workflow (Product → Legal → Stripe → Bank).](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Production Paused:** Weekly NGINX article production is paused to prevent a content bottleneck while \~10 articles await approval. This week's output will be two content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Product Team Education:** GrowthX will provide an executive summary on content strategy, explaining the value of SEO and competitor-focused content to the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**AI Traffic Hypothesis:** A new hypothesis links a recent surge in "direct" traffic to AI tools stripping referral data, suggesting content impact is being undercounted.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)

## Topics

### NGINX Content Approval Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The bank requires content in a specific G-Drive folder and is inflexible, blocking the standard Airtable workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Solution:** Joel will manually merge approved copy from Airtable into the bank's G-Drive doc, leaving a comment to signal final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Process:** The multi-stage approval path is Product → Legal → Stripe (via Asana) → Bank. The bank requires PDFs for review.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Airtable Workflow Enhancements

  - [**Goal:** Provide Joel and GrowthX with real-time visibility into the NGINX approval pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Action:** Carly will add new status fields to Airtable:](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [`Product Approval`](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [`Legal Approval`](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [`Bank Approval`](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [`All Approvals Signed Off`](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### Product Team Education

  - [**Need:** The product team requested guidance on content strategy, specifically the value of SEO and competitor-focused articles.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will create an executive summary based on Marcel's recent all-hands presentation to explain the "why" behind the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Weekly Content Production

  - [**Decision:** Pause weekly NGINX article production.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid a content bottleneck while \~10 articles are in the multi-stage approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Contingency:** The pause is temporary; production will resume if the approval process is smoother than expected.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [**This Week's Output:** Two content refreshes on top-performing articles, including an A/B test for CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Other Updates

  - [**Conversion Data:** Progress is blocked by the NGINX launch. Joel's capacity will increase soon with a new engineer and a dedicated Organic Growth hire.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**FlexPro Guidelines:** On hold due to uncertainty about a planned pricing update.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [**Direct Bill Guidelines:** Joel will compile and provide.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Add NGINX approval status fields to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Send the content strategy summary to Joel.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Assign two content refreshes for this week's production.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [Provide Direct Bill guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/JjRpzdM2xZjXAKmmrsBDxVBWitV3_8Sr?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
